name: append-command
summary: Append a new command entry to commands.jsonl safely.

inputs.name: command_json
inputs.description: The JSON string of the command to append

name: /append-command
summary: Backslash trigger for append-command to append commands safely.

inputs.name: command_json
inputs.description: The JSON string of the command to append

name: direct-knowledge-ingest
summary: Process large documents directly using conversational LLM - bypasses deep_research limitations

inputs.name: input_text
inputs.description: The large text chunk to ingest (no size limits)

examples: N5: run direct-knowledge-ingest --input_text 'Large document content here'
